title: Hopo Better Mineshaft
description: More and better mineshafts to explore
body: ![Alt text](https://imgur.com/sWhGgHc.png) # Hopo Better Mineshafts "15 mineshafts types" # [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/hopo-better-mineshaft?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hopo-better-mineshaft) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/949138580415062017?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/CZQthZJjPc) **💎 Mineshafts have been improved with this pack, there is more to see, enjoy!** ✨ Vanilla Mineshafts are fine, that's why i didn't touch them, instead, i added brand new mineshafts types, go explore in deepslate layers and be prepared to a new underground challenge. 🧨 Many themed rooms have been added, so you always have something to see and never get bored. 🎨 More of 10 types, each one with something unique, some of them could have more ores that others, or even mobs... ![Alt text](https://imgur.com/LQXHEUd.png) ![Alt text](https://imgur.com/DycIqbn.png) ![Alt text](https://imgur.com/1gTe61a.png) ### If you wanna start an adventure, use the code 'HOPONO' at checkout for 25% off your first month! ❤️ ### https://bisecthosting.com/hopono [![Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/CZQthZJjPc) [![CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_64h.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hopo-better-mineshaft) [](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hopo-better-mineshaft) [](https://ko-fi.com/hoponopono) ![Alt text](https://imgur.com/lNhcvC4.png)
